title: Jira Server & Data - Monday Forms with attachments flowing into Jira

posts.author: PKufeldt (Paul Kufeldt)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s great that you can setup two integrations on a Monday board to sync with Jira server and Monday.
What would be great would be to use the Monday Form view to allow users submit an item and it include attachments (files), labels and even components that would flow from Monday into Jira.

This could be used for support requests, feature requests etc

At the moment without the ability to add attachments and them send through into the Jira ticket, it means we have to use a different Jira ticket creation process and then just use a Monday board as a way of viewing the tickets in the Jira project for those without Jira access.
